description: Join Grab's Marketplace team to build the systems that power millions of daily rides, deliveries, and financial transactions across Southeast Asia. You'll ship production code from day one.
qualifications: Pursuing CS, CE, or related degree
Strong fundamentals in data structures & algorithms
Experience with at least one backend language (Go, Java, Python)
Familiar with REST APIs and basic system design

description: Shopee's Checkout & Payments squad is hiring fresh grads to scale the transaction infrastructure serving 800M+ users. Work on distributed systems that handle peak-season flash sales.
qualifications: Bachelor's in Computer Science or equivalent
Solid understanding of distributed systems
Proficiency in Java or C++
Knowledge of SQL databases

description: DBS's AI Centre of Excellence is building generative AI solutions for banking. Help prototype LLM-powered advisory tools, document processing pipelines, and fraud detection models.
qualifications: Pursuing CS, Data Science, or AI-related degree
Experience with Python and ML frameworks (PyTorch / TensorFlow)
Exposure to NLP or LLMs is a strong plus
Comfortable working with financial data

description: Build the creator-facing tools that empower 5M+ TikTok content creators in SEA. You'll work on the video editor, effects library, and live-streaming studio — high-impact, high-visibility work.
qualifications: Strong proficiency in React and TypeScript
Understanding of browser rendering and performance optimization
Eye for design and UX
Portfolio of personal or open-source projects

description: Stripe's APAC engineering hub is growing. As a new grad, you'll rotate across product areas — payments, fraud, billing, or infrastructure — before joining a permanent team. World-class eng culture.
qualifications: Bachelor's or Master's in CS or related field
Top academic standing or strong project portfolio
Deep CS fundamentals required
No specific language required — willingness to learn

description: Visa's Asia Pacific data science team analyses transaction patterns across billions of payments to detect fraud, improve authorization rates, and deliver merchant insights.
qualifications: Pursuing Statistics, Data Science, or CS degree
Strong SQL and Python skills
Experience with data visualisation tools
Exposure to big data (Spark, Hive) is a plus
